_meta.note: Commands verified against real ZIP contents. Statuses reflect current state — none of the new ZIPs are extracted yet.

ui-ux-pro-max-skill-main.healthCheck: Verify .claude/skills/ folder appears in project root after copy
ui-ux-pro-max-skill-main.note: No npm or pip required. Pure Claude Code plugin — activate by merging .claude/ into project.

21st-sdk-main.note: 160 MB monorepo. For single components without full extract: npx shadcn@latest add https://21st.dev/r/<component>

quant-ux-master.note: Vue.js v4.1.23. npm run serve runs on localhost:8080. Docker is simpler if Docker is available.

nano-banana-2-ai-main.note: Next.js 0.1.0. Requires GEMINI_API_KEY set in .env.local before running.

nano-banana-pro-main.note: Reference documentation only — no runnable code. Extract for README reference.

awesome-gpt-image-2-api-and-prompts-main.healthCheck: Verify cases/ folder exists after extraction
awesome-gpt-image-2-api-and-prompts-main.note: 244.9 MB — large due to case images. CC0 license. No install needed after extraction.

open-webui-main.installCommandDocker: docker run -d -p 3000:8080 --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v open-webui:/app/backend/data --name open-webui --restart always ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main
open-webui-main.installCommandManual: Expand-Archive -Path 'C:\Users\flavi\Downloads\open-webui-main.zip' -DestinationPath 'C:\EMOVEL\04_AI_STACK\open-webui-main'; cd C:\EMOVEL\04_AI_STACK\open-webui-main; npm install; pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
open-webui-main.runCommand: npm run dev  +  python -m open_webui serve
open-webui-main.note: open-webui v0.9.6. Docker is strongly recommended — avoids Python + Node dual-runtime setup.

penpot-develop.note: NEEDS_MANUAL_SETUP — Clojure. Docker via docker/images/docker-compose.yaml is the practical path. Clojure dev environment required for source modifications.

cap-main.note: NEEDS_MANUAL_SETUP — large monorepo (93.3 MB ZIP). Review apps/ structure after extraction before running.

screenity-master.runCommand: npm run build  then load unpacked extension in Chrome from build output folder
screenity-master.note: screenity v4.5.3. Browser extension — no server to run. Build then load in chrome://extensions as unpacked extension.

opencut-main.note: Small ZIP (0.3 MB) — likely no node_modules included. npm install required after extraction.

n8n-master.runCommand: npx n8n  OR  docker run -p 5678:5678 n8nio/n8n
n8n-master.note: n8n-monorepo v2.27.0. Prefer Docker or npx over building from source. Source ZIP useful for referencing .agents/skills/ Claude Code integration patterns.

claude-council-main.activateCommand: Copy C:\EMOVEL\04_AI_STACK\claude-council-main\skills\ into project root, or: npx skills add <path>
claude-council-main.healthCheck: Verify skills/claude-council/SKILL.md is accessible from project root
claude-council-main.note: claude-council v0.1.0. Claude Code skill. No npm install needed — skill activates via Claude Code when SKILL.md is reachable.

claude-cowork.note: Not found in Downloads, Desktop, or C:\EMOVEL. Cannot register until located.

gpt-pilot-main.note: Missing pydantic. Run pip install -r requirements.txt in a Python venv from the gpt-pilot-main folder.

claude-code-main.note: Installed as global CLI. No local repo needed.

reflex-main.note: reflex not in PATH. Install via pip in active Python environment.
